allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/exiftool-vendored/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('type:', p.type||'commonjs'\); console.log\('main:', p.main\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports\)\)")
Bash(node -e "try{require\('exiftool-vendored'\);console.log\('CJS require: OK'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('CJS require: FAILS ->', e.code\)}")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./data/memories.json'\); let t=0; for\(const d in m\) t+=m[d].media.length; console.log\('total media entries:', t, '\(should be 6\)'\); console.log\('dates:', Object.keys\(m\).length, '\(should be 4\)'\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const m=require\('./data/memories.json'\); m['2024-05-01'].title='The day the fountain soaked us both'; m['2024-03-14'].caption='A quiet afternoon'; fs.writeFileSync\('./data/memories.json', JSON.stringify\(m,null,2\)+'\\n'\)")
Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./data/memories.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(m['2024-05-01'],null,2\)\); console.log\('caption on 03-14 preserved:', m['2024-03-14'].caption\)")
